criteria.solvent: no desertion event in any archetype through round 16
criteria.rushCredibleR5: rush strike power (prof+merc+0.3*levy) >= 8 by end of round 5
criteria.turtleStrong: turtle net income (last-3-round avg) >= rush net AND >= 0.9x balanced net
criteria.turtleBounded: turtle gross gold income <= 1.3x balanced gross gold income

recommendation.note: passing sweep point nearest CONFIG defaults
